source_pdf: Biotechnology Progress - 2025 - Ming - Triton CG‐110 as an alternative for cell lysis in manufacturing of adeno‐associated.pdf

paper_meta.Paper_title: Biotechnology Progress - 2025 - Ming - Triton CG‐110 as an alternative for cell lysis in manufacturing of adeno‐associated

protocols.Paper_title: Triton CG-110 as an alternative for cell lysis in manufacturing of adeno-associated virus-based gene therapy
protocols.Evidence: “Small-scale lysis and clarification”; “Tween 20, Tween 80, DDM, and Triton CG-110 were tested…”

protocols.Paper_title: Triton CG-110 as an alternative for cell lysis in manufacturing of adeno-associated virus-based gene therapy
protocols.Evidence: “At-scale lysis, clarification, and affinity chromatography”; “Triton X-100, Triton CG-110, and DDM were assessed.”

protocols.Paper_title: Triton CG-110 as an alternative for cell lysis in manufacturing of adeno-associated virus-based gene therapy
protocols.Evidence: Figure 4 describes Molecule 2 at-scale clarification with Triton X-100, Triton CG-110, and DDM, measuring cell lysate, CCL, harvest yield, and affinity chromatography.

protocols.Paper_title: Triton CG-110 as an alternative for cell lysis in manufacturing of adeno-associated virus-based gene therapy
protocols.Evidence: Section 3.4 reports Molecule 4 at-scale results with Triton X-100, DDM, and Triton CG-110; turbidity and affinity chromatography were compared.

protocols.Paper_title: Triton CG-110 as an alternative for cell lysis in manufacturing of adeno-associated virus-based gene therapy
protocols.Evidence: Section 3.5/Figure 6 reports Molecule 1 harvesting with Triton CG-110 and COHC; CCL turbidity, harvest yield, and affinity chromatography were reported.

protocols.Paper_title: Triton CG-110 as an alternative for cell lysis in manufacturing of adeno-associated virus-based gene therapy
protocols.Evidence: Discussion states that small-scale lysis screened Tween 20, Tween 80, DDM, and Triton CG-110; the conclusion compares them with Triton X-100.
